_doc: Cover card (card 1) fixed template. Only swap: headline, hero object, mascot expression/pose, badge text.

headline_zone.role: Main question headline — MUST be largest element

badge_zone.role: Source/year badge — circle or rounded rect

hero_object_zone.role: Single realistic hero object — MUST be visually dominant

mascot_zone.role: 3D mascot interacting with hero object — sidekick, not star

footer_zone.role: Optional brand strip — can be empty

rules: Headline MUST be the largest, most prominent element
Only ONE hero object (e.g., one egg, one bowl, one cup)
Only ONE mascot, interacting with hero object
Mascot must be smaller than hero object
Background: warm realistic lifestyle (kitchen, table, natural light)
Visual and text must reinforce the same message
No text rendered by AI — all text added in composition stage
